name: MHC_class1_chr6
description: MHC class I region on chr6p21.33, telomeric portion of the ~3.6 Mb extended MHC. Contains the three classical class I genes HLA-A, HLA-B, HLA-C plus non-classical class I HLA-E, HLA-F, HLA-G and the MIC family (MICA, MICB). HLA-A/B/C are the most polymorphic loci in the human genome (>10000 alleles each as of 2026) with peptide-binding-groove residues under strong balancing selection. Sequence divergence between alleles at one locus can exceed 5%, complicating short-read mapping; long-read or PSV-aware mapping is required for accurate typing.
expected_copy_count: 1 of each gene per haplotype; allele diversity vastly exceeds inter-paralog divergence
